ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., individual, athlete, patient) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kg */,
  "dietary_restrictions" TEXT /* Dietary restrictions (e.g., vegetarian, gluten-free) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "recipe_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipe */,
  "calories" REAL /* Calories per serving */,
  "fat" REAL /* Fat content per serving */,
  "protein" REAL /* Protein content per serving */,
  "sugar" REAL /* Sugar content per serving */,
  "time_of_meal" TEXT /* Time of day the recipe is typically consumed (e.g., breakfast, lunch, dinner) */,
  "ingredients" TEXT /* List of ingredients required for the recipe */,
  "cooking_time" INTEGER /* Cooking time in minutes */,
  "serving_size" INTEGER /* Serving size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meal_plans" (
  "meal_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meal plan */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the meal plan */,
  "meal_plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the meal plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the meal plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the meal plan */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Goal of the meal plan (e.g., weight loss, muscle gain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meal_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_plans_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meal_plan_recipes" (
  "meal_plan_recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meal plan recipe */,
  "meal_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meal plan */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day (e.g., breakfast, lunch, dinner) */,
  "servings" INTEGER /* Number of servings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meal_plan_recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_plan_recipes_meal_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("meal_plan_id") REFERENCES meal_plans ("meal_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_plan_recipes_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_diaries" (
  "food_diary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food diary entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe consumed */,
  "servings" REAL /* Number of servings consumed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the food diary entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("food_diary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_diaries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_diaries_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutritional_info" (
  "nutritional_info_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutritional information entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "nutrition_fact" TEXT /* Nutrition fact (e.g., calories, fat, protein) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the nutrition fact */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., g, mg, kcal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutritional_info_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutritional_info_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the ingredient */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cup, tbsp, tsp) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ingredients_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workouts" (
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workout */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the workout */,
  "workout_type" TEXT /* Type of workout (e.g., cardio, strength training) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the workout in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workouts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wearable_data" (
  "wearable_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wearable data entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the entry */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps taken */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled in km */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Calories burned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wearable_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wearable_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress_photos" (
  "progress_photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress photo */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the photo */,
  "photo" TEXT /* The progress photo itself */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_photos_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
